summary: Backend + frontend smoke testing for new batch (holidays, sessions/bulk, fiches-projet, absences periode/bi-mensuelle, alerts period mode, dashboard cours-only, PlanningGlobal multi-day/journee-entiere/tous-formateurs/holidays, PlanningMacro a-programmer sidebar, Coordination page). Backend 12/12 pytest PASS. Frontend: all new data-testids found and rendering correctly; purple holiday 'Fete du travail' confirmed visible in week 27-Apr/1-May 2026.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' (Radix a11y warning, non-blocking)

action_items: [Optional/low] Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to shadcn Dialog components to silence Radix a11y warnings.
[Optional] Add data-testid on the inner <input type=checkbox> of 'dashboard-cours-only' (currently the testid sits on the wrapping <label>, so automated tests can't easily assert checked state).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1400+ lines - consider splitting into routers (auth, sessions, fiches_projet, dashboard) for maintainability (>700 LOC threshold).
sessions/bulk mode=='stage' uses isocalendar()[:2] for week grouping - correct; 35h cap scaling preserves ratio - OK.
/api/holidays is public (no auth) as documented in review_request - verified OK.
fiches-projet link-session does not verify session_id actually exists in sessions collection - could leave orphan references. Consider validation.
PlanningGlobal dialog is missing DialogDescription (Radix warning).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded promotions; all TEST_ prefixed data cleaned up by fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend routes: /absences-formateurs (NOT /absences), /recap-heures (NOT /recap), /coordination, /planning-global, /planning-macro, /alertes. Absence 'type-recurrence' select is conditionally rendered only when the 'Recurrence' checkbox is enabled. 'dashboard-cours-only' testid is on the <label> not input. The app shows a persistent 'MODE EDITION' banner when logged in as admin.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Initial frontend test FAILURES (dashboard-cours-only, tab-graphiques, new-absence-btn) were false negatives due to (1) wrong route guesses and (2) testid on <label> wrapper. Re-tests after route/selector correction all passed. All backend endpoints work as specified.
